assertions.title: Visual celebration effect appears on bingo

steps.action: Navigate to /game?seed=celebtest
steps.expected: Game board loads with 25 squares, no celebration
steps.observed: Game board loaded with 25 squares, no celebration visible

steps.action: Mark all 5 squares in first row (indices 0-4) via JS click
steps.expected: Bingo celebration triggers immediately
steps.observed: Bingo celebration triggered with confetti particles (40 particles) and '🎉 BINGO! 🎉' banner visible

steps.action: Verify confetti overlay exists in DOM
steps.expected: Confetti particles present in DOM
steps.observed: 40 confetti particle elements found with data-testid='confetti-particle'

steps.action: Verify BINGO banner is visible
steps.expected: Banner with 'BINGO!' text visible
steps.observed: role=alert element with text '🎉 BINGO! 🎉' present

steps.action: Check console errors
steps.expected: No console errors
steps.observed: No console errors

assertions.title: Celebration persists while bingo condition holds

steps.action: Wait 5 seconds after bingo achievement
steps.expected: Celebration still visible after 5 seconds
steps.observed: BINGO banner still visible (role=alert text: '🎉 BINGO! 🎉') and 40 confetti particles still in DOM after 5+ seconds

steps.action: Take screenshot after 5 seconds
steps.expected: Screenshot shows celebration still present
steps.observed: Screenshot captured showing celebration persisting

assertions.title: Celebration stops when bingo is broken

steps.action: With celebration active (row 1 complete), unmark first square in row 1
steps.expected: Celebration stops, banner disappears, confetti removed
steps.observed: After unmarking index 0: role=alert element gone, confetti particle count = 0

steps.action: Verify celebration is gone
steps.expected: No celebration elements in DOM
steps.observed: document.querySelector('[role=alert]') returns null, no confetti particles

steps.action: Take screenshot
steps.expected: Screenshot shows normal state without celebration
steps.observed: Screenshot captured showing board with 4 marked squares in row 1 and no celebration

steps.action: With celebration active (row 1 complete), click a square outside the bingo row using agent-browser click @e7
steps.expected: Square toggles to marked state despite celebration overlay
steps.observed: Click on 'Roasts a tech startup' (index 6) succeeded without timeout - aria-pressed changed from 'false' to 'true'

steps.action: Verify confetti overlay uses pointer-events-none
steps.expected: Confetti overlay should have pointer-events-none CSS
steps.observed: From source code inspection: confetti overlay div has class 'pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 overflow-hidden'

steps.action: Take screenshot
steps.expected: Screenshot shows celebration + newly marked square
steps.observed: Screenshot captured showing both celebration and newly marked square

assertions.title: Celebration is visually distinct from normal state

steps.action: Capture screenshot of normal board state (no marks)
steps.expected: Normal state screenshot for comparison
steps.observed: Normal state captured with all squares unmarked, no banner, no confetti

steps.action: Capture screenshot of celebration state (row 1 complete)
steps.expected: Celebration state clearly different from normal
steps.observed: Celebration state shows BINGO banner with glow animation, 40 confetti particles falling across screen, marked squares with different background color and checkmark stamps

steps.action: Compare the two states
steps.expected: Visually obvious difference without counting squares
steps.observed: Multiple visual differences: (1) confetti particles across entire viewport, (2) '🎉 BINGO! 🎉' banner with glow animation above board, (3) marked squares with different background and checkmarks

steps.action: Start with bingo active (row 1 complete, celebration visible)
steps.expected: Celebration active with banner and confetti
steps.observed: Celebration active: '🎉 BINGO! 🎉' banner, 40 confetti particles

steps.action: Unmark first square to break bingo
steps.expected: Celebration stops
steps.observed: Celebration gone: role=alert null, 0 confetti particles

steps.action: Re-mark the same square to re-achieve bingo
steps.expected: Celebration re-triggers
steps.observed: Celebration re-appeared: '🎉 BINGO! 🎉' banner visible, 40 confetti particles regenerated

steps.action: Take screenshot
steps.expected: Screenshot shows celebration back after re-marking
steps.observed: Screenshot captured showing re-triggered celebration

assertions.title: Multiple rapid square toggles with bingo check

steps.action: Clear all marks and reload page for fresh state
steps.expected: Fresh board with no marks and no celebration
steps.observed: Fresh board loaded, no celebration

steps.action: Rapidly mark all 5 squares in first row (indices 0-4) in 1ms via JS loop
steps.expected: Bingo triggers correctly despite rapid state changes
steps.observed: All 5 squares marked in 1ms elapsed, bingo correctly detected: '🎉 BINGO! 🎉' banner appeared, 40 confetti particles

steps.action: Rapidly unmark 2 squares (indices 0 and 1) in 1ms via JS loop
steps.expected: Bingo clears correctly, no stale state
steps.observed: 2 squares unmarked in 1ms, first row states: ['false','false','true','true','true'], celebration gone: 'no celebration'

steps.action: Verify no stale state or lag
steps.expected: UI state matches actual data state
steps.observed: React state correctly propagated: unmarked squares show aria-pressed='false', marked show 'true', celebration correctly absent

frictions.description: Playwright click command times out when clicking squares with special characters in text (e.g., quotes like 'Says "this is actually really simple"'). The agent-browser click @e2 command failed with timeout after successfully clicking @e1.
frictions.resolution: Used JS eval with document.querySelectorAll('button[aria-pressed]')[index].click() to interact with squares directly, bypassing Playwright's element resolution

frictions.description: React state updates from JS click() are batched and don't update aria-pressed synchronously - must wait ~500ms before checking DOM state
frictions.resolution: Added 'wait 500' between JS clicks and state verification

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. Celebration effect works correctly: confetti + BINGO banner appears on bingo, persists while condition holds, stops when broken, doesn't block interaction, is visually distinct, re-triggers on re-achievement, and handles rapid toggles without state issues.
